emails.body: I haven't heard back from Rebecca on this, but I'm sure she is busy. Do either of you care to answer my question below. Forwarded by Rod Hayslett/FGT/Enron on 07/28/2000 07:30 AM Rod Hayslett 07/20/2000 12:44 PM

emails.subject: Re: Trip to Wessex
emails.body: Re: Trip to Wessex Rod- Thanks for your assistance. I've gotten good feedback on your inputs from our Wessex folks. Ultimately, I want to bill your costs into a transaction account that we have at Wessex. I'll check on the procedure today and let you know asap. Thanks. Rod Hayslett ENRON 07/28/2000 07:31 AM
